title: Channeling
description: Mod that makes Minecraft feel longer!
body:
Channeling is a Minecraft Fabric mod aiming to make the game feel longer!

It currently adds: Darkness and Endium, Abandoned Digsite (Structure), more advancements and probably a little bit more.

IMPORTANT: This mod may not be properly compatible with fabric 1.19.2 servers, please report any bugs about it at our issue tracker!

Channeling is a Minecraft mod that adds lots of new features! (Well, probably not right now...) We are constantly updating this because I am dedicated to finishing this! Also make sure to check my YouTube channel, I'll usually upload Channeling trailers and other things.

If you want to help me maintain and keep this mod stable, report bugs at our issues page!

Due to the developer's cat sadly passing, updates may now be slowed down.

Features I am adding are incredibly small! You are also able to submit a feature request at the Issues page.
